story: Sabra and Meira were hanging out in the bank. They saw a knapsack and a box. They found a button in the knapsack. Meira left the bank. Sabra moved the button to the box.

    [Question]

    [Output]

    [Candidate Answers]
    A. cabinet
    B. closet
    
    [Output]
    Person A is Neila. Person B is Juanita. The item is towel. The location X is closet. The location Y is cabinet.
